title: erodium cicutarium subsp. pilosum
intro: Erodium cicutarium subsp. pilosum, also known as the red-stemmed storksbill, is a plant species within the geranium family that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as a diuretic. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
